## Summary

Describe the automation idea.

## Why

Explain the manual pain point or process gap.

## Inputs And Outputs

Describe the expected inputs, outputs, and affected files.

## Constraints

List any boundaries, such as no API use, no workflow changes, or no direct edits to investment content.

## Proposed Sprint Goal

State the smallest useful version of the work.
